title: Chest Stealer
description: A mod that allows you to quickly and automatically loot items from a chest when you open it.
body:
# Chest Stealer

A lightweight client-side mod for Minecraft that allows you to quickly and automatically loot items from containers when you open it.

![Chest Stealer Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eJWJmhsn/images/9e18d1b1006611181ac816f2f7e1335e9be8fd22.gif)

The mod simulates holding down Shift and Left Click on items in the chest every tick (20 times per second)

**WARNING:** The use of this mod may flag anticheats. Please check server rules before using this mod

## Features
- Configurable looting speed via itemsPerTick and item filtering (Whitelist/Blacklist) to target specific items. You can customize these settings in the config/cheststealer.properties (added in v1.1.0).
- Smart skipping of empty slots (very fast even in messy chests)
- Toggle with a single key (default **R**)
- Keybind is configurable in Controls → Chest Stealer
- Shows status in the action bar (ENABLED / DISABLED)

## Controls
- **R** — toggle auto-steal on/off (default; changeable in settings)
- Only works when the feature is enabled and a chest is open
